summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Staylet compliance tracking app. Backend APIs working well with minor issues. Frontend E2E testing successful with full user journey verified.

minor_issues.issue: Response structure missing 'missing_documents' field (expected by old test)
minor_issues.impact: Test expectation mismatch, actual API works correctly
Correct behavior, test expectation was wrong

ui_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with correct stats
Properties CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Property detail page with compliance summary
Compliance status calculation (compliant/expiring_soon based on dates)
Dashboard stats update with real data
Modal dialogs for property and compliance creation
Backend compliance records endpoints with filtering
